narrative:
Mechanic township has 1,223 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.4 percentage points.
